subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! At morn and eventide, with the remembrance of the Most Glorious Beauty, make thou the dwelling of thy heart a mystic garden and a rose-bower [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله در صباح و مساء بذکر جمال ابهی کاشانه دل را گلشن راز کن و گلبن
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
